what_helped: The prompt successfully maintains the required JSON schema and output contract.
what_hurt: The agent is ignoring the implicit system constraint of `max_helpers=2`, causing the entire run to fail.
The prompt is too generic and lacks guidance on managing the complexity of the decomposition relative to the system's limits.

recommendation.reason: The current prompt leads to a hard failure because the agent attempts to create too many helpers. We need to inject a constraint into the family-level prompt to ensure the agent stays within the system's operational limits (max 2 helpers) while still performing meaningful decomposition.

Title: S1. AHC001 / AtCoder Ad

Place many non-overlapping axis-aligned ad rectangles in a 10000 x 10000 square so each advertiser gets a rectangle containing its requested point and with area close to its requested target area.

Grading target:
Continuous score from advertiser satisfaction.
Higher is better.
